api_key.description: Split.io Admin API key, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Split.io API base URL override for tests or proxies.

workspace_id.description: Split.io workspace ID; required by the environments, splits, and segments streams to substitute the {workspace_id} path segment.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
